name: Le Corbusier Centre
description: A museum dedicated to the visionary architect who designed Chandigarh, housed in his former office building — showcasing rare sketches, furniture, and the city's planning history.
history: Located in the building that served as Le Corbusier's office during the city's construction in the 1950s. Contains original drawings and correspondence.
famousFor: Le Corbusier's original sketches, city planning documents, and furniture.
